changelogs.0.7.15: Improved performance, added fix for Car o Monkeys
changelogs.0.9.0: New modules (FatJack, Fuel, Jerk), /tmhelp command, renamable commands per module, Qbox support, /explode fix
changelogs.0.10.0: AIG/npcgun: fix server→client trigger, reliable CPed pool targeting, vehicle NPCs, higher default attackRadius; chat suggestions only when Config.ChatSuggestions=true (fixes nil showing all)
changelogs.0.11.0: New Cat Follow module (/catfollow [id]) -- spawns a friendly housecat that trots after the target player. Ported from the standalone 'rappe' resource with the floating 3D text removed and proper target-side spawning so the cat streams reliably.
